AxisDataTypeEnum.description: Specify the data inherent type of the axis. The plotter uses this to choose appropriate visualization defaults (e.g an xy-point-cloud for 'discrete' or a continuous xy-curve for 'continuous' ).

HeatmapAxisNodalityTypeEnum.description: Data for Heatmaps can be node-centric (i.e. a rectangular value 'around' point (x1,y1)), or cell-centric (i.e. a value inside cell [x1,x2]x[y1,y2]). This choice has runtime implications about the expected matrix size of 'z' (see Heatmap description).

Unit3DSDetails.description: Resolved physical unit name, unit symbol, and magnitude name. Optionally also unit conversion factors to SI units. No i18n used; this is an intermediate solution until this information can be obtained using only 'Unit3DS'. Examples: magnitudeName = 'Electric field strength', unitSymbol = 'V_m', unitName = 'Volt per meter'.

version.description: Versioning to prepare future upgrades of this schema. Must be '1'.

Unit3DS.description: Physical unit of the data represented in [3DS magnitude and units](https://dsxdev-online.dsone.3ds.com/doconline/English/CAAKniKnowledgeAdvisor/CAALifTaMagnitudes.htm) format, e.g. unitNameInternal = 'VOLT_PER_METER' and magnitudeNameInternal = 'ELECTRICFIELDSTRENGTH'. Potentially to be replaced by enums in a later version.

version.description: Versioning to prepare future upgrades of this schema. Must be '1'.

Axis.description: Data describing the axis, e.g. physical unit and additional properties of the data.

text_no_i18n.description: Axis label which will be shown by the plotter. Overridden by 'Unit3DS' if specified. Prefer using 'Unit3DS' units if possible. Potentially to be removed in a later version.

logfactor.description: Logarithmic factor used for dB-scaling. Can be '20' (e.g. for a field quantity), or '10' (e.g. for a power quantity), or '0' (to explicitly disable dB-scaling). Default is '0'.

version.description: Versioning to prepare future upgrades of this schema. Must be '1'.

Heatmap.description:
Data on a regular 2D Cartesian grid that describes a mapping from a CoDomain value to a color. 'x' defines the x-axis-values as an array of numbers; its length defines the expected number of columns for 'z'. 'y' defines the y-axis-values as array; its length defines the expected number of rows for 'z'. The arrays 'x' and 'y' need to be sorted strictly monotonically increasing. Data can be node-centric (i.e. a value 'around' (x1,y1)), or cell-centric (i.e. a value inside cell [x1,x2]x[y1,y2]).
 For a node-centric representation, matrix size of 'z' has to be sy x sx. For a grid-centric representation, matrix size of 'z' has to be (sy-1) x (sx-1). In case 'z_im' is provided, 'z' and 'z_im' are interpreted as real and imaginary part of complex numbers.

text_no_i18n.description: Title which will be shown by the plotter. Overridden by z_axis' 'Unit3DS' if specified. Prefer using 'Unit3DS' units for 'z' if possible. Potentially to be removed in a later version.

version.description: Versioning to prepare future upgrades of this schema. Must be '1'.

description: Root schema validating against all defined objects.
